caption: A woman with dark hair wearing a striped purple and white shirt and over-ear headphones is speaking. She is positioned in front of a light-colored wall and a window with sheer yellow and blue curtains. The text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in the bottom-left corner of the screen. As the sequence progresses, she continues to speak, with her mouth opening and closing and her facial expression shifting slightly. Her head moves subtly, and she maintains a direct gaze toward the camera. The background setting remains static throughout, and she stays centered in the frame while she speaks.
